title: How to Enable External Client Access to Files in a Pro Account Board?
excerpt: For a client, I created a board where, through the tab view, a link can be shared with an external client. Now, we also want the external client to be able to view the ‘files’ column and the ‘files’ widget. The client ha…

posts.author: JanSalesStudio (Jan)
posts.cookedHtml: For a client, I created a board where, through the tab view, a link can be shared with an external client. Now, we also want the external client to be able to view the ‘files’ column and the ‘files’ widget. The client has a Pro account. Does anyone have an idea on how I can make this possible?

posts.author: JDer (Daniel Jackman)
posts.cookedHtml: To let the external client view the ‘files’ column and widget on the board, you might want to make sure that the board is set to ‘Shareable’ in your settings. Then, when you share the link with your client, they should be able to access those files.
